covered where physical therapy is reasonable and 
necessary to restore or maintain function or to prevent or slow further deterioration. Refer 
to §40.2.1(d)(1) for the reasonable and necessary coverage criteria associated with 
restoring patient function. 

EXAMPLE 1: 

A physician has ordered gait evaluation and training for a patient whose gait has been 
materially impaired by scar tissue resulting from burns. Physical therapy services to
